Container.Name: Ollama-Nvidia
Container.Overview: GPU-accelerated Ollama local LLM server using the Unraid NVIDIA Driver plugin. Serves the Ollama HTTP API on port 11434. Requires the "Nvidia-Driver" Unraid plugin installed and a compatible GPU; use templates/ollama.xml instead on machines without a passed-through NVIDIA GPU. Models are large (several GB each) and persist under the Ollama Models path — plan appdata storage accordingly.
Container.Requires: Requires the community "Nvidia-Driver" Unraid plugin and a supported GPU. If the container fails to start with a runtime error, confirm the plugin is installed and the driver version matches the GPU before reporting a template bug. Do not expose this container to the public internet — it has no authentication.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: Ollama HTTP API port. Point clients (Open WebUI, CLI, Kind Robots integrations, etc.) at this port. Visiting it directly in a browser just returns the plain-text 'Ollama is running' health check.

Config.Name: Ollama Models
Config.Description: Persistent model store and Ollama state. Pulled models live here; back this up or re-pull models are lost on removal.

Config.Name: NVIDIA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
Config.Description: Which GPUs to expose to the container. 'all' exposes every GPU on the host; set a specific GPU UUID to restrict it on multi-GPU systems.

Config.Name: NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES
Config.Description: NVIDIA container capabilities required for compute workloads. Leave at the default unless you know you need more.
